title: SpringWorks Therapeutics: CHMP valuta positivamente Mirdametinib per il trattamento di pazienti adulti e pediatrici affetti da NF1-PN
author: N/A
description: SpringWorks Therapeutics announced that the European Medicines Agency's CHMP has issued a positive opinion for the approval of mirdametinib to treat adult and pediatric patients with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas (NF1-PN). If approved, mirdametinib would be the first and only therapy in the EU with marketing authorization for both adults and children with NF1-PN.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article reports that the CHMP has issued a positive opinion for the approval of SpringWorks Therapeutics' drug mirdametinib to treat NF1-PN in both adult and pediatric patients, which is a significant milestone for the company.
The article does not mention Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany, as it is not directly related to the main content of the news.
